title: Boraginella angustifolia
taxonomy: Boraginella angustifolia is classified in the kingdom Plantae, with the phylum Angiospermophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. It belongs to the order Boraginales and the family Boraginaceae. Further, it is grouped into the genus Boraginella. The species angustifolia is the specific epithet, indicating its narrow leaf shape. Its classification is a way to categorize and understand its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
uses: Boraginella angustifolia is a plant that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems.
